profile.name: Ahmed Hassan
profile.headline: Senior Civil Engineer | Infrastructure Specialist | PMP Certified
profile.title: Senior Civil Engineer
profile.bio: 15+ years experience in civil engineering with expertise in infrastructure projects. Passionate about innovative construction methods and sustainable development. Led teams on projects valued at over $500M including highways, bridges, and commercial complexes.

profile.name: Fatima Al-Mutairi
profile.headline: Award-Winning Architect | Sustainable Design Expert | LEED AP
profile.title: Architect
profile.bio: Award-winning architect specializing in sustainable design and smart buildings. Featured in Architectural Digest Middle East. Committed to creating spaces that inspire while respecting our environment.

profile.name: Mohammed Al-Qahtani
profile.headline: Project Manager | Mega Project Specialist | PMP & PRINCE2 Certified
profile.title: Project Manager
profile.bio: Experienced project manager with track record of delivering mega projects on time and budget. Managed portfolios exceeding $1B across oil & gas, infrastructure, and commercial sectors.

profile.name: Sara Al-Zahrani
profile.headline: Sustainability Consultant | LEED & WELL Expert | Green Building Champion
profile.title: Sustainability Consultant
profile.bio: Expert in green building certification and environmental impact assessment. Helped over 50 projects achieve LEED certification. Passionate about creating a sustainable built environment aligned with Saudi Vision 2030.

profile.name: Khalid Al-Harbi
profile.headline: Chartered Quantity Surveyor | Cost Management Expert | RICS Member
profile.title: Quantity Surveyor
profile.bio: Chartered quantity surveyor with expertise in cost management and contract administration. Managed cost control for projects totaling $800M. Specializing in pre-contract and post-contract QS services.

profile.name: Noura Al-Saud
profile.headline: Interior Designer | Luxury Hospitality Specialist | Award Winner
profile.title: Senior Interior Designer
profile.bio: Luxury interior designer with 9 years of experience in hospitality and high-end residential projects. Winner of Saudi Design Awards 2024. Creating timeless spaces that blend Saudi heritage with contemporary aesthetics.
profile.education: BFA Interior Design - Dar Al-Hekma University

profile.name: Omar Al-Mansour
profile.headline: MEP Engineer | Data Center Specialist | Mission Critical Expert
profile.title: MEP Engineering Manager
profile.bio: MEP engineering leader specializing in mission-critical facilities and data centers. Led MEP design and delivery for 5 Tier III+ data centers in the Kingdom. Expert in high-efficiency HVAC and power systems.

profile.name: Layla Ibrahim
profile.headline: Legal Counsel | Construction Law | Contract Specialist
profile.title: Legal Counsel
profile.bio: Construction law specialist with expertise in FIDIC contracts, dispute resolution, and claims management. Advised on contracts worth over $2B. Member of Saudi Bar Association and DRBF.
profile.education: LLM Construction Law - King's College London
